name: Kythera Jam
tagline: Weekly community gathering with music, meditation, and connection
description: Our flagship weekly gathering. Every Thursday, we come together in a circle to practice music as meditation. No audience, no performers - just humans making sound together.

name: Bhakti Jam
tagline: Spiritual sound sessions with devotional music
description: A deeper dive into the spiritual dimension of sound. Bhakti Jams combine devotional music, chanting, and meditation for a transformative experience.

name: Corporate Programs
tagline: Team building and wellness through collaborative music
description: Bring the power of collaborative music to your organization. Perfect for team building, stress relief, and fostering creativity.

name: Kythera InnerCircle
description: Join our membership community for dedicated practitioners. Get unlimited access to jams, exclusive events, and a deeper connection to the Kythera family.

name: Kids Programs
tagline: Music, play, and creativity for children
description: Introduce your children to the joy of collaborative music-making. Our kids programs include Backyard Junk Jam sessions and birthday party offerings.

name: Retreats
description: Deep-dive weekend retreats combining music, meditation, and nature. Coming soon!
